title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the practice of building the wrapper and orchestration layer around LLM-based coding agents. The harness comprises rules, skills, hooks, and subagents at the session level, plus multi-session orchestration for reliable execution of larger tasks. This wrapper is claimed to constitute roughly 98% of production agent systems like Claude Code.
